declarations.description: Payment-focused extension of jb-input for Iranian card numbers (شماره کارت) and SHABA (شبا) values with canonical value normalization, grouped display values, and built-in validation.
declarations.name: JBPaymentInputWebComponent

attributes.name: input-type
attributes.description: Payment value mode. Accepted values are CARD and SHABA. Invalid values fall back to CARD.

attributes.name: separator
attributes.description: Separator used in displayValue, such as space, dash, underscore, or an empty string.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Canonical English-digit payment value without separators.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Visible label text and accessible aria label.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Helper text shown under the input when no validation error is visible.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Form field name forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Placeholder forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: autocomplete
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Native autocomplete value forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: inputmode
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Native inputmode value forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Native readonly attribute forwarded to the inner input.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Disables the input.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Enables required validation. A string value is used as the required validation message.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. External validation error message.

attributes.name: disable-auto-validation
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Disables automatic validation on input and blur.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Inherited from jb-input. Visual size variant.

members.name: paymentInputType
members.description: Payment value mode. Accepted values are CARD and SHABA. Invalid values fall back to CARD.

members.name: separatorString
members.description: Separator used in displayValue. Empty string removes grouping separators.

members.name: value
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. Canonical English-digit payment value without separators.

members.name: displayValue
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. Rendered grouped value using separatorString.

members.name: validation
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. Validation helper from jb-validation.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. Enables or disables the component.

members.name: required
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. Enables required validation.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. True when current value differs from initialValue.

members.name: validationMessage
members.description: Inherited from jb-input. Current validation message.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Runs validation without showing the error message.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Runs validation and shows the first error message.

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Focuses the inner native input.

methods.name: setSelectionRange
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Forwards setSelectionRange to the inner input.

methods.name: addStandardValueCallback
methods.description: Inherited from jb-input. Registers a callback that can transform displayValue and submitted value.

events.name: input
events.description: Inherited from jb-input and dispatched on user edits after payment value standardization.

events.name: change
events.description: Inherited from jb-input and dispatched when the payment value changes and is committed.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Inherited from jb-input and dispatched when validation fails.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Cancelable event dispatched before the native input changes.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Keyboard event re-dispatched from the host.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Keyboard event re-dispatched from the host.

events.name: enter
events.description: Inherited from jb-input. Dispatched on keyup when Enter is pressed.

slots.name: start-section
slots.description: Inherited from jb-input. Content rendered before the native input. Commonly used for bank-indicator.

slots.name: end-section
slots.description: Inherited from jb-input. Content rendered after the native input. Commonly used for bank-indicator.

cssParts.name: label
cssParts.description: Inherited from jb-input. The label element.

cssParts.name: input-box
cssParts.description: Inherited from jb-input. The wrapper around slots and inner input.

cssParts.name: input
cssParts.description: Inherited from jb-input. The inner native input.

cssParts.name: message
cssParts.description: Inherited from jb-input. The helper or validation message element.

cssProperties.name: --jb-input-input-direction
cssProperties.description: Inherited from jb-input. jb-payment-input sets it to ltr by default.

declarations.description: Iranian bank indicator web component that displays a bank logo from a card prefix or from the closest parent jb-payment-input value.
declarations.name: BankIndicatorWebComponent

attributes.name: prefix
attributes.description: Six-digit card prefix used for bank detection.

members.name: selectedBank
members.description: Currently detected bank. Null shows the default card icon.

methods.name: changeBank
methods.description: Updates selectedBank from a card prefix.
